sub_modules.conv3d_window_control: Combinational valid-window detector for valid-padding 3D convolution boundaries.
sub_modules.conv3d_address_generator: Combinational 3D sliding-window tap address generator over depth, row, and column dimensions.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac_array: Combinational multiply-accumulate array for the flattened 3D convolution window and kernel.
